about.title: About {{productName}}
about.description: A self-hosted Terraform module and provider registry with support for SCM integration, provider mirroring, Terraform binary distribution, and multi-tenancy.

auth.devModeNotice: Development mode - Click below to login without OAuth
auth.noProviders: No SSO providers configured. Contact your administrator.
auth.ssoInfo: This application uses single sign-on for authentication.
auth.ssoContact: Contact your administrator if you need access.
auth.devLoginFailed: Dev login failed. Check server logs.
auth.ldapLoginFailed: LDAP login failed. Check your credentials.

home.heroSubtitle: Host and manage your custom Terraform modules, providers, and binaries
home.searchAcross: Search across modules and providers in this registry
home.modulesDescription: Browse and use private Terraform modules for your infrastructure.
home.providersDescription: Access custom and mirrored Terraform providers for your cloud resources.
home.terraformBinariesDescription: Download Terraform and OpenTofu binaries from internal mirrors.
home.step1Desc: Authenticate with your organization’s OIDC or Azure AD credentials to access the registry.
home.step2DescAuth: Generate an API key and add it to your Terraform CLI credentials file:
home.step2DescUnauth: Sign in to generate an API key, then add it to your Terraform CLI credentials file:
home.signInToGenerate: Sign in to generate a key
home.step3Desc: Browse modules and providers, then reference them directly in your Terraform configuration using this registry’s hostname.
home.protocolDesc: Full compatibility with Terraform Registry Protocol v1 — use this registry directly in Terraform CLI and provider configurations without any plugins or proxies.
home.setupRequiredDesc: This registry has not been configured yet. Complete the setup wizard to configure authentication, storage, and the initial admin account.
home.featureSetupDesc: New features have been added that require configuration. Complete the setup wizard to enable them.
